title: Copper Expansion rp
body:
This resourcepack required My datapack Copper Expansion (need optifine or CEM mod for mods variants  textures) https://modrinth.com/datapack/copper-expansion-pale-garden ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/301757e5d6a061094da06f9156d3a6c9e1f94fa8_0.webp)

Features: -Full Armor copper set and Dark copper set, better than netherite. -All the copper tools, axe, sword, hoe, pickaxe and shovel textures.
